name: General Tao's Chicken (Le Piment Rouge)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------MARINADE----------------------------------
1. In a bowl, mix egg white, cornstarch, and 1 tablespoon soy sauce.
2. Add chicken pieces and marinate for at least two hours.
3. Heat oil in a deep pot until it reaches 350 degrees.
4. Fry several marinated chicken pieces at a time until crisp, about one or two minutes.
5. Remove fried chicken and pieces of oil.
6. In a wok, stir fry ginger, scallions, garlic, and chili peppers over high heat.
7. Add the fried chicken to the wok and mix quickly.
8. Stir in sugar, remaining soy sauce, vinegar, and cornstarch mixed with chicken stock.
9. Remove from heat and add sesame oil.
10. Serve hot over steamed rice.
Serves 4.
